---
name: Fresh Eval Teams
description: Multi-round evals: never include prior scores in prompts. Raw source, identical rubrics, minimum 3 rounds.
type: feedback
---

Never include prior scores or findings in eval prompts. Raw source only, identical rubrics each round, minimum 3 rounds. Kills anchoring bias.

**How to apply:** Each eval round starts from the raw artifact (tool help text, SKILL.md). No previous score in context. Rubric is static across all rounds.
